candidate_functional_effect: model catastrophic-forgetting as episodic discharge events with detectable precursors, self-limiting feedback, quasi-periodic recurrence; schedule replay-checkpoints pre-event

results.judge_justification: Identifies three forgetting mechanisms (gradient interference, representational drift, loss-landscape flattening) — these are direct functional analogs of 'sub-symbol embedding instability preceding the event' that the candidate proposes.
Mitigates abrupt forgetting via context-aware pretraining; partially overlapping with checkpoint-scheduling but no periodic-event modeling.
Reframes performance drops as alignment-decline; orthogonal mechanism.
Sequential unlearning utility degradation; different setting.
Source-shielded updates for language adaptation; orthogonal mechanism.
